Variables.Name: Stiffness
Variables.Description: The spring strength of the drive. Force proportional to the position error.

Variables.Name: Damping
Variables.Description: The damping strength of the drive. Force proportional to the velocity error.

Variables.Name: MaxForce
Variables.Description: The force limit of the drive.

Variables.Name: bEnablePositionDrive
Variables.Description: EnablesDisables position drive (orientation if using angular drive)

Variables.Name: bEnableVelocityDrive
Variables.Description: EnablesDisables velocity drive (angular velocity if using angular drive)
